rag_rules: Use validator diagnostics to identify and fix type mismatches in AGREE expressions
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible and correctly typed
Remove or correct invalid guarantees that cause type errors
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
generic_rules: Preserve the original architecture when making repairs
Focus on fixing the reported issue without changing unrelated parts of the model
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions
Ensure all type declarations and expressions are consistent
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible and correctly typed
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture or components to fix AGREE type errors
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not ignore validator diagnostics and make assumptions about the model
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
